basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi (AIIMS New Delhi) Project Associate-II Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website https://www.aiims.edu/. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS New Delhi Project Associate-II Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed via email to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 50 years (as on last date of application)

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / BPharm, OR Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent, AND Two years’ experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services. | Note: All salaries and experience requirements are as per ANRF guidelines.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must fill the Google Application Form available at: https://forms.gle/3AAottGoDmuqaSWU7
Submit the form with all required details before the deadline.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview.
Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview.
important_instructions: Incomplete applications or those received after the deadline will not be considered. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. The decision of the competent authority regarding selection shall be final and binding. Age should not exceed 50 years as on the last date of application.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Project Associate Vacancy Details
AIIMS Delhi Project Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Four years Bachelor’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / Master’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences / BVSc / BPharm, OR Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine from a recognized University or equivalent, AND Two years’ experience in R&D in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services. Note: All salaries and experience requirements are as per ANRF guidelines.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Associate 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates must fill the Google Application Form available at: https://forms.gle/3AAottGoDmuqaSWU7 Submit the form with all required details before the deadline. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the interview. Candidates must bring all original documents at the time of interview. Last Date: 25 July 2026 (up to 4:00 PM)

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Incomplete applications or those received after the deadline will not be considered. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. The decision of the competent authority regarding selection shall be final and binding. Age should not exceed 50 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS New Delhi Project Associate-II 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 25 July 2026 (up to 4:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Project Associate at AIIMS New Delhi?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the ANRF-funded project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-II at AIIMS New Delhi?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive ₹42,000/- + HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for AIIMS ANRF Project Associate?
faq.answer: Master’s degree / Four-year Bachelor’s degree in Science/Engineering/Medicine + 2 years R&D experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AIIMS New Delhi Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates should not exceed 50 years as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS New Delhi ANRF Project Position?
faq.answer: Fill the online Google Form at: https://forms.gle/3AAottGoDmuqaSWU7

faq.question: Q7. Is the Project Associate post permanent?
faq.answer: No, the position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project duration.

faq.question: Q8. Will interview be conducted for AIIMS Project Associate selection?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for interview via email. No TA/DA is admissible.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project title at AIIMS New Delhi ANRF-89?
faq.answer: “In-House development and field validation of 3D-printed Open Flexure Microscope as a point-of-care cytology tool for oral Cancer and Oral potentially Malignant Disorders Screening in Low-Resource Setting”.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official advertisement for AIIMS New Delhi Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official AIIMS New Delhi website or refer to the advertisement dated 10.07.2026.
